tasks.subject: Task 1: Vercel migration — remove static export config
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove static export settings from next.config.js so API routes and SSR work on Vercel.

**Files:**
- Modify: `next.config.js`
- Create: `vercel.json`
- Delete: `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0 with no static export errors
- [ ] `vercel.json` exists at repo root
- [ ] `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` is deleted

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["next.config.js", "vercel.json", ".github/workflows/deploy.yml"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build exits 0", "vercel.json exists", "deploy.yml deleted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Install npm dependencies
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all packages the lab requires.

**Files:**
- Modify: `package.json`, `package-lock.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npm install` exits 0
- [ ] next-auth, @aws-sdk/client-s3, @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner, nanoid, d3 in node_modules
- [ ] `npm run build` exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "package-lock.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm install exits 0", "next-auth installed", "d3 installed", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Auth layer — NextAuth + middleware + login page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Google OAuth restricted to 3 emails. All /lab/dashboard and /lab/results/* protected.

**Files:**
- Create: lib/auth.ts, middleware.ts, app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts, app/components/lab/SessionWrapper.tsx, app/lab/layout.tsx, app/lab/page.tsx, app/lab/login/page.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] npm run build exits 0
- [ ] unauthenticated /lab/dashboard redirects to /lab/login
- [ ] non-allowlisted email denied

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/auth.ts", "middleware.ts", "app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts", "app/components/lab/SessionWrapper.tsx", "app/lab/layout.tsx", "app/lab/page.tsx", "app/lab/login/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run build exits 0", "unauthenticated /lab/dashboard redirects to /lab/login", "non-allowlisted email denied"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: API routes — upload, start, status, list, results-url
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Five API routes for job lifecycle.

**Files:**
- Create: app/api/jobs/route.ts, app/api/jobs/upload/route.ts, app/api/jobs/[id]/start/route.ts, app/api/jobs/[id]/status/route.ts, app/api/jobs/[id]/results-url/route.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All routes return 401 without session
- [ ] POST /api/jobs/upload returns jobId and uploadUrl
- [ ] npm run build exits 0

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/jobs/route.ts", "app/api/jobs/upload/route.ts", "app/api/jobs/[id]/start/route.ts", "app/api/jobs/[id]/status/route.ts", "app/api/jobs/[id]/results-url/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all routes return 401 without session", "POST /api/jobs/upload returns jobId and uploadUrl", "npm run build exits 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: Modal Python pipeline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Python CV pipeline on Modal with non-blocking web trigger. Writes results.json to S3.

**Files:**
- Create: modal_pipeline/pipeline.py
- Create: modal_pipeline/requirements.txt

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] modal deploy exits 0
- [ ] Web endpoint URL returned
- [ ] results.json written to S3 after test run
- [ ] meta.json status reaches done

**Verify:** `modal deploy modal_pipeline/pipeline.py` → outputs endpoint URL

```json:metadata
{"files": ["modal_pipeline/pipeline.py", "modal_pipeline/requirements.txt"], "verifyCommand": "modal deploy modal_pipeline/pipeline.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modal deploy exits 0", "endpoint URL printed", "results.json written to S3", "meta.json status reaches done"]}
```
